examples: It could get suddenly nippy in the evenings.
"You're so nippy at it," John said, "couldn't you do it very slowly once?"
It's cool today. It's nippy today.
Start with jamon croquettes served with a smoky chipotle essence which offers a nippy counterpoint to the perfectly breaded croquette.
Tootling around town in the car, I was impressed - it was surprisingly nippy, easy to park, and a comfortable drive.
